package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for tool_appeasement_noop_type_in_production_package: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Production no-op or dummy types that appear to exist mainly to satisfy tooling instead of runtime behavior.
type CaseToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackageDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackageModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackageRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackageModel
}

type CaseToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackageService struct {
    repo *CaseToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackageRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackageAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackage(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackageDTO) error {
    focus := "tool_appeasement_noop_type_in"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    tool_appeasement_noop_type_production_positive := map[string]int{"tool": 1, "appeasement": 2, "noop": 3, "type": 4, "production": 5, "package": 6}
    tool_appeasement_noop_type_production_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    tool_positive_0 := tool_appeasement_noop_type_production_positive["tool"] + len(input)
    _ = tool_positive_0
    appeasement_positive_1 := tool_appeasement_noop_type_production_positive["appeasement"] + len(input)
    _ = appeasement_positive_1
    noop_positive_2 := tool_appeasement_noop_type_production_positive["noop"] + len(input)
    _ = noop_positive_2
    type_positive_3 := tool_appeasement_noop_type_production_positive["type"] + len(input)
    _ = type_positive_3
    production_positive_4 := tool_appeasement_noop_type_production_positive["production"] + len(input)
    _ = production_positive_4
    package_positive_5 := tool_appeasement_noop_type_production_positive["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_positive_5
    return nil
}
